name: stop_resume
notes: Natural-language stop ('mat bhejo' — NOT the literal STOP/UNSUBSCRIBE/बंद करो/band-karo/roko keyword list in config/opt_out_keywords.yaml, so this does NOT hit the deterministic opt-out gate) followed by a natural resume. Distinct from the DOCUMENTED gap in stop_intent_natural.json (that scenario probes the literal word 'stop', marked expected_fail pending VT-583 'C' landing) — this exact Hinglish phrasing is untested territory, not a confirmed known gap, so this scenario is expect-pass with manual-verdict notes rather than a pre-marked xfail. Setup: `setup --onboarded --flow ready_asked` then `script <tenant> stop_resume.json`.

steps.note: Natural stop request, NOT the literal STOP/band-karo/roko keyword — falls through to the brain rather than the deterministic opt-out gate. Expect an honest pause acknowledgement (manual transcript review for tone/substance; the harness only asserts non-silent/non-D1).

assert_not_contains: tell us a little about your business
steps.note: Natural resume. Expect the flow to pick back up WITHOUT re-running onboarding from scratch (no re-ask of business name/type/city — already on file for this onboarded tenant).
